title: camaridium standleyi
intro: Camaridium standleyi, also known as the "Standley's Cattleya", is a species of orchid native to Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Camaridium standleyi include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and even help manage diabetes. Camaridium standleyi is often prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and can also be used in tincture or dried flower form for medicinal purposes.
